zh.Trefor, Denbighshire, Wales: 英國威爾斯丹比爾特福 在 利格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Tangwystrl verch Lorwerth於1280年出生在英國威爾斯丹比爾時，她的父親Lorwerth ab Ednyfed30歲，母親Angharad verch Leuaf Fychan15歲。她和Adda ab Awr至少有1個兒子。

meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Orlo.

variants.name: Ferch
meanings: German: variant of   Ferg  . Compare   Verch  .
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förtsch (see Foertsch ).
Probably also an Americanized form of German Förch (see Foerch ).

en.lifeSummary: When Tangwystrl verch Lorwerth was born in 1280, in Denbighshire, Wales, United Kingdom, her father, Lorwerth ab Ednyfed, was 30 and her mother, Angharad verch Leuaf Fychan, was 15. She had at least 1 son with Adda ab Awr.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Tangwystrl verch Lorwerth est née en 1280, à Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Lorwerth ab Ednyfed, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Angharad verch Leuaf Fychan, avait 15 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Adda ab Awr.
